title: Newslaundry acted with malicious intent towards TV Today, its tone reflects intolerance: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday ruled that digital media platform Newslaundry acted with “malicious intent” in its coverage of TV Today Network, adding that its tone reflected intolerance rather than fair criticism.A Division Bench of Justices C Hari Shankar and Om Prakash Shukla said that Newslaundry repeatedly targeted TV Today and its journalists with disparaging commentary that went beyond the scope of fair critique. The Court noted that Newslaundry not only criticised TV Today’s editori
